cases.name: pull-minimal
cases.covers: Smallest legal request: header + pull + one caught-up subscription

cases.name: pull-bootstrap
cases.covers: cursor = -1, accept bits incl. sqlite + signed URLs, params, resumed bootstrapState round-trip

cases.name: push-multi-commit
cases.covers: Two commits: upsert with baseVersion, delete, row-codec payload edge cases (NULL bitmap, empty string, non-BMP unicode, json-typed column raw-string round-trip)

cases.name: combined
cases.covers: Push + pull in one envelope (SPEC.md §1.5 ordering)

invalid.name: truncated-no-end
invalid.covers: Truncated envelope: body ends without an END frame

invalid.name: bad-magic
invalid.covers: Envelope magic is SSP1, not SSP2

invalid.name: unsupported-wire-version
invalid.covers: wireVersion 999 is rejected before reading frames

invalid.name: overlong-frame-length
invalid.covers: Frame length prefix exceeds the remaining bytes

invalid.name: op-enum-out-of-range
invalid.covers: Push operation op byte 3 (unknown enum byte)

invalid.name: upsert-without-payload
invalid.covers: Upsert operation with absent payload (presence invariant)
